subject: (no subject)
body:
Thank you for lunch

The closest person to Crist is Paul Bradshaw (see below) for a long time
(He wrote the ignagural speech )

I have a great in to him and could go see him on a no names basis to see what is possible

Southern Strategy Group
Tallahassee, FL 32301

Let me know if this could be helpful,
DM
Sent via BlackBerry from T-Mobile  
David Mitchell
NOTE NEW ADDRESS

New York NY 10022
